core_payload.content:
# Background Agent Runtime

## 1. Definition and Essence
Background Agent Runtime defines the durable operational harness that lets LLM-backed agents work continuously, safely, and observably inside N1Hub. It is not the model itself. It is the surrounding runtime that keeps daemon processes alive, schedules jobs, preserves state, routes tool access, and exposes enough control for operators to trust long-lived autonomy.

## 2. Core Responsibilities
- `daemon_lifecycle` keeps agent services alive under supervised host processes.
- `dispatch_and_scheduling` decides when background work should run, pause, or cool down.
- `mode_shaping` separates daytime co-pilot work, nighttime autonomy, planning-only cycles, and Dream-safe execution cycles.
- `durable_state` preserves checkpoints, summaries, run history, and resumable execution context.
- `capsule_job_execution` turns graph work into normalized, inspectable job envelopes.
- `conversation_and_delegation_bridge` connects chat surfaces to deeper runtime lanes without collapsing everything into prompts.
- `provider_and_tool_handoff` bridges AI Wallet, DeepMine, Symphony, local skills, and subscription-backed lanes into one operating path.
- `operator_oversight` feeds status, logs, and controls into an accountable surface.

## 3. N1Hub Integration
In N1Hub this runtime is realized through always-on Symphony and N-Infinity services, `capsule_graph` jobs, worktree-isolated execution, nightly autonomy windows, and provider-backed DeepMine calls. It is the layer that lets Chat to Capsules and Agent Delegation hand real work into background lanes instead of stopping at explanation. In Dream the runtime should become mode-aware enough that the same system can behave like a polite co-pilot by day and a bounded autonomous vault-maintenance layer by night without confusing those duties.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
Background Agent Runtime supports To Dig Deep by making autonomy answerable to capsule evidence, durable state, and operator-visible control rather than to shallow prompt loops.

## Autonomous Vault Swarm Notes

- Run: vault-steward-1773015063934
- Job: Decomposition review for unfinished foundation hubs
- Workstream: decomposition
- Note: Tightened the boundary around runtime responsibilities and integration points rather than model behavior. Split pressure remains high along the named responsibility seams; the minimum viable future splits are lifecycle and scheduling, durable state plus capsule-job execution, and the delegation/provider/operator interface layer.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Background Agent Runtime is the Dream-branch hub for the durable operating layer around long-lived LLM-backed work in N1Hub: supervised daemon lifecycle, dispatch and mode-aware scheduling, durable state, normalized capsule-job execution, chat-to-delegation bridging, provider and tool handoff, and operator-visible oversight. It defines how Symphony, N-Infinity, capsule_graph jobs, worktree-isolated execution, and nightly autonomy windows run inside one accountable runtime without redefining model behavior.
